ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 10/15/2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM on October 15, 2026. During this window, VPN access will be unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience.

If you have any questions or need assistance, contact the IT Help Desk.

Thank you,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear [User],

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 account password will expire in 24 hours. To avoid service disruption, please renew your password by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you do not update your password within 24 hours, access to your account will be permanently disabled. This is a mandatory compliance requirement.

Thank you,
Microsoft Security Team
